heading:
All of it,
as you are,
on anything
copy:
Run offline on your device, be always available hosted online, you decide.
Lolly Tools can work there.

models.label: Deploy
models.desc: Ship to devices through your existing MDM. Runs fully offline, behind any firewall or air-gap - nothing leaves the device.

models.label: Serve
models.desc: One hosted instance, used in any browser. Nothing to install - approved updates reach everyone the instant they ship.

models.label: Hybrid
models.desc: Offline local apps plus an always-current web version, sharing one tool library - across every OS at once.
